content.text:
Build green.

**Report:**
- **Modified:** `crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs:1145-1147`
- **What it does:** Returns `stack_last - top` (count of free slots above `top` before hitting the stack-last sentinel), using saturating subtraction. Matches C `lua_checkstack`'s `L->stack_last.p - L->top.p` predicate at `lapi.c:117` and mirrors the inline calculation already present in `check_stack` at `state.rs:1148`.
- **Caller:** `crates/lua-vm/src/api.rs:152` in `check_stack`, which compares `available > n` and falls through to `grow_stack` if not.
- **New todos surfaced:** None inside this body — but the same `check_stack` caller next dispatches to `state.grow_stack(...)` (still `todo!("phase-b: grow_stack")` at line 1154), which will be the next panic if `n` exceeds free slots.
- **cargo build -p lua-cli:** green (warnings only).
